## Summary

This PR wires the v4 marker convention documented at `frame/pipeline-metrics-v4-schema.md`. In prose, a block shaped like `<!-- pipeline-metrics ... -->` should never be treated as a real block by the parser.

## Test plan

- [x] Verified locally

<!-- cost-summary:begin -->
**Session cost**: $236.5105 (partial, pr-creation-mid-session) - [full breakdown](https://github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra/pull/879#issuecomment-5009741930)
<!-- cost-summary:end -->

metrics_version: 4

    adapter: work-adapter
    status: passed
    evidence: 'issue #691; experience completion marker posted'

    adapter: work-adapter

    evidence: 'issue #691; design completion marker posted'

    input: 47637
    output: 1037253

Trailer text after the block, untouched by any splice.
